meaning: 弗雷德里克顿[加拿大东南部城市](新不伦瑞克省省会)
examples: In Adaptive Research Reports, 1998, NB Department of Agriculture and Rural Development, Fredericton, NB.
BLOCK: That's 10-year-old Kathryn Aurora Gray of Fredericton, New Brunswick, the youngest person ever to discover a supernova.
A city of northern New Brunswick, Canada, on Chaleur Bay north-northeast of Fredericton. It is a popular beach resort. Population, 5,705.
Another protest was planned along a highway in Fredericton, New Brunswick by the Kingsclear First Nation.
